title: Simple JSON Parser
description: Build a JSON parser from scratch. Practice enums, pattern matching, error handling, and recursive data structures.

steps.title: Define JSON value types
steps.instructions: Create a JsonValue enum representing all JSON types: Null, Bool, Number, String, Array, and Object. Use Box for recursive types.

steps.title: Parse primitives
steps.instructions: Implement parsing for null, true, false, numbers, and strings. Return Result<(JsonValue, &str), String> where the &str is the remaining input.

steps.title: Parse arrays and objects
steps.instructions: Implement array and object parsing. These are recursive — they call parse_value for each element.

steps.title: Main parse function and tests
steps.instructions: Create the top-level parse() function and test it with sample JSON. Handle whitespace skipping between tokens.
